label: 区域点生矩形
description: 在 01 区域网格的有效（1）范围内，围绕一个采样 point2d 点贴合一个矩形：中心尽量靠近该点、长宽尽量接近输入宽高，且完整落在区域内，放不下就缩小。点落在 0 格时取最近的 1 格作为锚点；区域全 0 时输出同形状全 0 网格，否则至少保留 1 个格。输出与输入同形状、矩形处为 1 的新网格。坐标约定：x→列、y→行。
description-en: Fit a rectangle around a sampled point2d inside the valid (1) area of a 0/1 region grid: center as close to the point as possible, size as close to the target width/height as possible, fully contained in the region, shrinking if it doesn't fit. If the point lands on a 0 cell, the nearest 1 cell anchors it; an all-zero region yields an all-zero grid, otherwise at least one cell is kept. Output is a new grid (same shape) with 1s in the rectangle. Coordinates: x→column, y→row.
icon: 深色网格背景上有一片不规则的浅色有效区域，区域内有一个亮紫色小圆点，圆点周围贴合出一个亮蓝色矩形，矩形完整落在浅色区域内，扁平插画风格小图标，主色蓝紫两种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 01（或多值）区域网格；矩形只在非零有效格内寻找。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 (or multi-valued) region grid; the rectangle is searched only within non-zero valid cells.

inputs.name: point
inputs.label: 采样点
inputs.description: 采样 point2d 点，x→列、y→行；矩形中心尽量贴近此点。
inputs.description-en: Sampled point2d (x→column, y→row); the rectangle center stays as close to it as possible.

inputs.name: width
inputs.label: 目标宽度
inputs.description: 目标矩形宽度（列数），放不下会缩小，最小 1。
inputs.description-en: Target rectangle width in columns; shrinks if it doesn't fit, minimum 1.

inputs.name: height
inputs.label: 目标高度
inputs.description: 目标矩形高度（行数），放不下会缩小，最小 1。
inputs.description-en: Target rectangle height in rows; shrinks if it doesn't fit, minimum 1.

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 输出网格
outputs.description: 与输入同形状的 01 网格，贴合出的矩形处为 1，其余为 0。
outputs.description-en: A 0/1 grid (same shape as input) with 1s in the fitted rectangle and 0s elsewhere.
